array.string: LOG_FILE=/Users/eric/.goldman-news-live/tmp/live-hourly.log; echo \"[\$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] launchd trigger\" >> \$LOG_FILE; X_HEADLESS=1 /opt/homebrew/bin/node /Users/eric/.goldman-news-live/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs /Users/eric/.goldman-news-live/scripts/publish-live-feed.ts >> \$LOG_FILE 2>&1; STATUS=\$?; echo \"[\$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] live:publish exit code: \$STATUS\" >> \$LOG_FILE; exit 0
